name: Debbie
subject: Trump is trying to distract you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

We are only halfway through May. Which is pretty hard to believe when you look at the whirlwind of destructive and troubling happenings that Trump has unleashed on Washington in just two weeks.

Trump and Republicans want to cobble together as much smoke and as many mirrors as possible to distract you from what they've been up to. **Here 's a quick breakdown of Trump's latest terrible two weeks:**
1. House Republicans passed their ACA repeal. Without fully reading the text or waiting for a CBO score, Republicans jammed through a plan that would leave millions without insurance and would cut Medicaid.
2. Trump fired FBI Director James Comey after Comey requested additional resources for the probe into Trump's ties to Russia. Meanwhile, the White House's official explanations for his firing continue to change day-by-day.
3. The Trump administration dismissed five scientists on the Scientific Review Board at the EPA. Board members review the research completed by EPA scientists. Their replacements -- lobbyists and industry representatives.

The list goes on and on. I am committed to resisting Trump and Republicans with everything that I have. We can't let their disastrous plans become a cruel reality. Our institutions are under attack.

[_**Our mid-month deadline is at midnight TONIGHT. We need 56 donors to step up so that we can hit our goal. Help us reach our goal and continue to grow our grassroots network.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e9d/622b7b5b/2cd0218/307bcbd9/2448873510/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse170515?refcode=dwse170515_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Trump and the Republicans are threatening America with their dangerous and cruel agenda. We must fight back.

[_**Please, make a contribution.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e9d/622b7b5b/2cd0218/307bcbd9/2448873510/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse170515?refcode=dwse170515_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Let's stay strong,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e9d/622b7b5b/2cd0218/307bcbd8/2448873510/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Next=20Level=20Indiana?=
subject: Get Ready Indiana!
body:
| | | Help Take Indiana to the Next Level
---
[View this email in your browser](http://mailchi.mp/16d61aa78df1/get-ready-indiana?e=8b11e0c120)
---
| | [ ](http://nextlevelindiana.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67f69d7e14c70b2763b9502bf&id=625c97f09e&e=8b11e0c120)
---
|
---
| [ ](http://nextlevelindiana.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67f69d7e14c70b2763b9502bf&id=687cf9cdd9&e=8b11e0c120 "Next Level Indiana Promo")
---
#
Indiana is off to a great start!
**Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Legislature are moving fast.**
## **Pre- K**
Indiana is dramatically increasing early learning opportunities for our children with the most need - giving these kids a critical chance of a stronger start in life.
## **Tech**
Indiana will advance its efforts to support new home-grown companies. We will make it easier for Hoosier business to connect with capital investors from around the country and the world and become a destination for the next generation of technology enterprises.
##
**Economy**
Indiana will be fertile ground for entrepreneurs and innovators to grow new business. We will help our workforce become diverse and prepare to fill the jobs of the ever-changing economy. Our approach will be holistic and we will think regionally about solutions that allow all Hoosiers to thrive.
## **Roads**
Indiana is investing in all of its infrastructure - better connecting us to each other and the world. We can now maintain, enhance and build new roads for Hoosiers to interact locally and globally with others
# The Next Level Indiana agenda belongs to all Hoosiers.
Hoosier leaders have shown that by coming together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish and no cap on the potential of our state to be a place to work, live and thrive. **We invite everyone to help advance the interest of our state and take Indiana to the Next Level.** | [Watch the Video](http://nextlevelindiana.us15.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=67f69d7e14c70b2763b9502bf&id=5ade6ee724&e=8b11e0c120)

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: 200,000 votes suppressed
body:
Protect our right to vote.
---
**Add your name: say you're committed to stopping the GOP's assault on our right to vote.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd")**

Friend --

A shocking new report last week revealed that Wisconsin's oppressive voter ID law -- passed by Republicans and signed into law by Scott Walker -- prevented 200,000 people from voting. Donald Trump only won Wisconsin by 22,000 votes.

Our right to vote is under assault all across the country, and the consequences are catastrophic.

[**We have to fight back. Add your name and say you'll stand with Democrats to defend access to the ballot box.**](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+have+to+fight+back+Add+your+name+and+&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd")

The GOP's nationwide voter suppression campaign is being spearheaded by Republican governors and state legislatures, but you can bet that Donald Trump is doing his part.

Last week, Trump created a new commission that is specifically charged with investigating voter fraud, which study after study has proven is virtually non-existent -- more people get struck by lightning each year than commit in-person voter fraud.

And this commission will be led by Kris Kobach, the man responsible for some of the most heinous voting restrictions in the country, who has spent years lying about voter fraud in order to keep African Americans and Latinos from the polls. It's terrifying to think of the new voter suppression tactics he'll come up with the backing of the federal government behind him.

**So we have to be prepared to fight back. Add your name and say you'll resist the GOP's attacks on our access to the ballot box. It's going to take all of us:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce29/4067b0a/2f8d95e9d/7e77aaee/657553467/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce29/4067b0a/2f8d95e9d/7e77aaef/657553467/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce29/4067b0a/2f8d95e9d/7e77aaec/657553467/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce29/4067b0a/2f8d95e9d/7e77aaed/657553467/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp_nd&source=em_20170515_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Debbie
subject: don't let motherhood become a pre-existing condition
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Yesterday was Mother's Day.

**That 's some cruel irony given that the newly-passed health care plan from House Republicans could make motherhood a pre-existing condition.**

As a mother, this clearly disturbs me. As an American, this should disturb us all. We cannot go back to a time when maternity and newborn care were optional for insurers to cover.

[_**Mothers deserve access to health care regardless of what state they live in. Add your name and stand up for the mothers of America.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ee2/622b7b5b/2cf9ec6/307bcbf8/2799847737/VEsH/ "http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170513")

Being a mother is one of the greatest blessings in my life. Quality affordable health care is important for mothers and children, especially during pregnancy and in the first few years of a child's life.

Insurers should not be able to charge mothers more for care to pad their bottom line. And they certainly shouldn't be able to deny care.

[_**Let 's make sure motherhood is never a pre-existing condition. Join me, and let's fight back.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ee2/622b7b5b/2cf9ec6/307bcbf8/2799847737/VEsE/ "http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170513")

Thank you,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ee2/622b7b5b/2cf9ec6/307bcbfb/2799847737/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: quick health care survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

Over a week ago, House Republicans passed a bill that would take away health insurance from 24 million Americans, raise premiums for seniors, and could take away protections for those with pre-existing conditions. This breaks President Trump's promises on the campaign trail that any Republican health care bill would not take away care and would not raise premiums.

This bill is unacceptable, and I will work in the Senate to block it. I believe there are ways to improve the Affordable Care Act -- but we should be ensuring that _more_ people get covered, not fewer. I will not support any bill that reverses our country's progress on health care.

**As always, I want to know what Virginians think.[Will you take my team's short survey about the Republicans' health care bill?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=V8JL1Ik97m4HaZMZWvWk8LTwg3fL7ir%2F)**

Thanks,
Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iJFy5ersvfCL4bJe8kr0cLTwg3fL7ir%2F)
---
| Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=KeB2%2BLALr%2BdY0f%2FzYylrCrTwg3fL7ir%2F).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

This bill is unacceptable, and I will work in the Senate to block it. I believe there are ways to improve the Affordable Care Act -- but we should be ensuring that more people get covered, not fewer. I will not support any bill that reverses our country's progress on health care. As always, I want to know what Virginians think. name: Roy Cooper
subject: re: Supreme Court today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is a big win for North Carolina voters -- we can't stop now. Chip in if you're with me.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f87/2fde7c66/43e3ae88/156902af/236422510/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
This is big, friends. The Supreme Court just declined to hear an appeal that could have reinstated the harmful Republican voter access law. Remember, this is the law that a court said targeted African Americans "with almost surgical precision." **[We need to be making it easier for people to register and vote, not harder. This is a big win for North Carolina voters -- we can't stop now. Chip in if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f87/2fde7c66/43e3ae88/156902af/236422510/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** The right to vote is one of our most basic, fundamental rights. I will continue to work to protect the right of every legal, registered North Carolinian to participate in our democratic process. **[If you're with me in this fight, chip in today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f87/2fde7c66/43e3ae88/156902af/236422510/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Thanks for all you continue to do, Roy
| | [**Chip in today ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202f87/2fde7c66/43e3ae88/156902af/236422510/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170515-cooper-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170515_voting_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Remember, this is the law that a court said targeted African Americans "with almost surgical precision." "" The right to vote is one of our most basic, fundamental rights. I will continue to work to protect the right of every legal, registered North Carolinian to participate in our democratic process. "" Thanks for all you continue to do, Roy | | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: IMPORTANT: Protect LGBTQ communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1c3/3159481766/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1c3/3159481766/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
No one deserves to be told that who they are is somehow not good enough or that they need to be "fixed."
Unfortunately, that's exactly what "conversion therapy," sometimes referred to as "sexual orientation change efforts" or "reparative therapy," does. These horrific efforts have one goal: to change an individual's sexual orientation or gender identity.
Let's be clear, everyone. This practice is based on the false, bigoted idea that being lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, or queer is in some way a mental illness that needs to be cured.
It's not just wrong -- it also doesn't work. There is no credible evidence that conversion therapy can change one's sexual orientation.
[**Please, add your name and urge Congress to end the dangerous practice of "conversion therapy" once and for all.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1cc/3159481766/VEsF/ "http://www.letsendconversiontherapy.com/?sc=ja_20170505_conv_hassan")
"Conversion therapy" has been shown to lead to depression, substance abuse, and even suicide, and it should have no place in our society.
[**We're asking you directly: stand with the LGBTQ community and tell Congress to take action to end "conversion therapy."**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1cc/3159481766/VEsC/ "http://www.letsendconversiontherapy.com/?sc=ja_20170505_conv_hassan")
Thank you for standing up for what is right.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1cd/3159481766/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDUxNV9jb252ZXJzaW9udGhlcmFweV9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20170515_conversiontherapy_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1ce/3159481766/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

[ ](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd59/2a380d31/1539e910/fef1cf/3159481766/VEsB/ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/legalcode")

This practice is based on the false, bigoted idea that being lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, or queer is in some way a mental illness that needs to be cured. name: Tom Perez
subject: Add your name to stop the GOP's attacks on voting rights:
body:
Protect our right to vote.
---
**Add your name: say you're committed to stopping the GOP's assault on our right to vote.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp2_nd&source=em_20170515_tp2_nd")**

Friend --

Last week, Donald Trump signed an executive order creating a "Presidential Commission on Election Integrity" -- if you're rolling your eyes at the idea of "Donald Trump" and "integrity" in the same sentence, you're not alone.

Like so much of what the Trump administration has done, this commission is a sham. It stems from Trump's ongoing complaint that there were between 3 and 5 million "illegal" votes that cost him the popular vote in last year's election (which, by the way, is completely ridiculous -- you're more likely to find someone who's been struck by lightning than committed in-person voter fraud).

We know the truth behind this new commission. It's a propaganda factory designed to justify the GOP's ongoing efforts to make it harder for people of color, working families, students, and seniors to exercise the right to vote.

Look no further than the man Trump put in charge -- Kris Kobach, who has devoted his career to lying about voter fraud in order to keep African American and Latino voters from the polls. He's been the architect of some of the most restrictive voting laws in the country. Now he's in charge of "election integrity?" Give me a break.

We can't trust Donald Trump, Kris Kobach, Jeff Sessions, or anyone in this administration -- it's up to us protect access to the ballot box.

**Are you with us? Say you're ready to stand up to the GOP's assault on the right to vote:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Right-to-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp2_nd&source=em_20170515_tp2_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce22/4067b0a/2f88eab7c/7e77aee1/2360422752/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp2_nd&source=em_20170515_tp2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce22/4067b0a/2f88eab7c/7e77aeee/2360422752/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp2_nd&source=em_20170515_tp2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce22/4067b0a/2f88eab7c/7e77aeef/2360422752/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp2_nd&source=em_20170515_tp2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce22/4067b0a/2f88eab7c/7e77aeec/2360422752/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170515_tp2_nd&source=em_20170515_tp2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

It stems from Trump's ongoing complaint that there were between 3 and 5 million "illegal" votes that cost him the popular vote in last year's election (which, by the way, is completely ridiculous -- you're more likely to find someone who's been struck by lightning than committed in-person voter fraud). name: urgent@dscc.org
subject: A pattern we can't ignore
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The House deal on Trumpcare flew under the radar until it was too late... and now the Senate could be poised to do the same.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170515-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend,

Do you remember how just a few weeks ago pundit after pundit was saying that Trumpcare would never pass in the House?

All the while, Trump and Paul Ryan were working behind closed doors to cobble a repeal deal that was even WORSE than the first version.

With expectations low, the GOP unveiled a new plan, suspended House rules, and passed their bill in _less than 36 hours._

And STILL, almost as soon as this happened, report after report said that health care repeal was DOA in the Senate...

But right now, Mitch McConnell is leading a group of 12 all-male Senators (behind closed doors) to hammer out their version of health care repeal.

Sound familiar, friend? It does to us, too. So we're not taking anything for granted.

**That 's why the DSCC is launching new ads in target states. **We will make it crystal clear that our eyes are on health care... and how our neighbors, friends, and families will be impacted by this heartless bill.

But we need your help to keep the pressure on, friend.

**Will you chip in $1, or whatever you can, right now to help keep our ads and all our efforts to stop the GOP going strong? Chip in here:

[http://dscc.org/be-vigilant-on-health-care-repeal](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170515-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

We already saw this month what the GOP is capable of when they think nobody's watching.

It's more important than ever that we be vigilant, outspoken, and focused in the fight.

Help us do that, friend. [**_Chip in here >>_**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170515-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for keeping your eye on health care,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e7eb/2b07114c/534853ff/736e382a/2442068846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e7eb/2b07114c/534853ff/736e3825/2442068846/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e7eb/2b07114c/534853ff/736e3824/2442068846/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Geoff Burgan
subject: in the headlines
body:
the New York Times
#
Team --
Since the beginning, this campaign has been different: we've unapologetically given voice to those who didn't have one before. We've ignored the cynics, who told us we couldn't campaign like this in Florida - the same ones who told us we had to run as "Republican Lite" to win. Here's what the _New York Times_ had to say about Andrew and our campaign this morning:
_"A firebrand on the stump, he has called insistently for a rollback of Republican education policies and for aggressive action against climate change._
_"Since House Republicans passed a bill that would gut the Affordable Care Act, Mr. Gillum has made protecting health care regulations on the state level a centerpiece of his message."_
[**Help us elect Andrew Gillum as our first Democratic Governor in Florida since 1994 by chipping in to our campaign now >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3359/9e00690/484bc294/24037539/4081615983/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170515-nyt")
We're running to give every voter in this state a voice - whether they're in a red or blue county. We're going to stick to our principles, talk to every voter we can, and with your help, we're going to win this campaign together.
Bring it home,
Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3359/9e00690/484bc294/24037539/4081615983/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170515-nyt")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3359/9e00690/484bc294/24037538/4081615983/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3359/9e00690/484bc294/2403753b/4081615983/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3359/9e00690/484bc294/2403753a/4081615983/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
